Description:
Ballistics of the WB040 high explosive fragmentation shell fired from the Type 83 122mm howitzer. 

Charge loads a mix of 2.5 kg 12/7 and 0.5 kg 14/1 pyroxylin grains. Muzzle velocity is 618 m/s from a peak breech pressure of 2700 kgf/cm^2 copper crusher gauge. Chamber volume is 5.769 L, charge volume measures 3.98 dm. Projectile travel measures 32.36 dm. 

Combat weight 2627 kg, traveling weight 2669 kg. Range of traverse is 54 degrees. Chamber measures 559.1 mm from breech to start of rifling. Recoil length is 920-1050 mm with extreme stop at 1100 mm. Gun measures 4284.5 mm inclusive of muzzle device. 

References:
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
